__comment_pageTitle__: Title that is shown on a tab in a browser

simulatedAuth.__comment__: Simulated SSH Pubkey Auth presented at the top of the terminal

banner.__comment_content__: A banner at the top of terminal after the simulatedAuth. I used an ascii art representation of my domain which I generated with -> https://patorjk.com/software/taag/?p=display&f=ANSI%20Shadow&t=calumm.dev&x=none

whoami.content: Hi! I'm John Doe, a Software Developer with a 100 years of experience in a 5 year old programming language

email.__comment__: Break down the email address into parts to hopefully avoid spam crawling
email.__comment_username__: Username portion of the email address, eg 'john.doe@example.com' would be 'john.doe'

date.__comment__: Outputs the date and time in the provided time zone, eg 15 April 2026 at 20:14 BST

pgp.__comment_url__: Relative or absolute Url of your PGP key
pgp.__comment_newTab__: Open the link in a new tab?

__comment_aliases__: Command aliases, takes precedence over commands, format [[ alias: actual_command ]]
